array_types.name: CTRL_PAUSE_DBG_Field_Array
array_types.code:
type CTRL_PAUSE_DBG_Field_Array is array (0 .. 1) of Boolean
  with Component_Size => 1, Size => 2;

record_types.name: CTRL_PAUSE_DBG_Field
CTRL_Register

fields.name: TIME
fields.description: Pause the watchdog timer when JTAG is accessing the bus fabric

fields.name: PAUSE_JTAG
fields.description: Pause the watchdog timer when processor 0 is in debug mode

fields.name: PAUSE_DBG
fields.description: unspecified

fields.name: Reserved_27_29
fields.description: When not enabled the watchdog timer is paused

fields.name: ENABLE
fields.description:
After a write operation all bits in the field are cleared (set to
zero). Trigger a watchdog reset

record_types.name: LOAD_Register

fields.name: LOAD
fields.description: unspecified

record_types.name: REASON_Register

fields.name: TIMER
fields.description: Read-only.

fields.name: FORCE
fields.description: unspecified

record_types.name: TICK_Register

fields.name: CYCLES
fields.description: start / stop tick generation

fields.name: ENABLE
fields.description: Read-only. Is the tick generator running?

fields.name: RUNNING
fields.description:
Read-only. Count down timer: the remaining number clk_tick cycles
before the next tick is generated.

fields.name: COUNT
fields.description: unspecified

record_types.name: WATCHDOG_Peripheral

fields.name: CTRL
fields.description:
Load the watchdog timer. The maximum setting is 0xffffff which
corresponds to 0xffffff / 2 ticks before triggering a watchdog reset
(see errata RP2040-E1).

fields.name: LOAD
fields.description:
Logs the reason for the last reset. Both bits are zero for the case
of a hardware reset.

fields.name: REASON
fields.description:
Scratch register. Information persists through soft reset of the
chip.

fields.name: SCRATCH0
fields.description:
Scratch register. Information persists through soft reset of the
chip.

fields.name: SCRATCH1
fields.description:
Scratch register. Information persists through soft reset of the
chip.

fields.name: SCRATCH2
fields.description:
Scratch register. Information persists through soft reset of the
chip.

fields.name: SCRATCH3
fields.description:
Scratch register. Information persists through soft reset of the
chip.

fields.name: SCRATCH4
fields.description:
Scratch register. Information persists through soft reset of the
chip.

fields.name: SCRATCH5
fields.description:
Scratch register. Information persists through soft reset of the
chip.

fields.name: SCRATCH6
fields.description:
Scratch register. Information persists through soft reset of the
chip.

fields.name: SCRATCH7
fields.description: Controls the tick generator

variables.name: WATCHDOG_Periph
variables.code:
WATCHDOG_Periph : aliased WATCHDOG_Peripheral
  with Import, Address => WATCHDOG_Base;
